name: construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, compliance reporting delays cause regulatory penalties. We automate report preparation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in preparing timely workers' compensation compliance reports.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in preparing timely workers' compensation compliance reports.
